items.title: Hawks' Dyson Daniels made second team All-Defense. NAW somewhat surprisingly did not get a single vote.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks' Dyson Daniels made second team All-Defense. NAW somewhat surprisingly did not get a single vote.

I'm a bit surprised Portland's Toumani Camara didn't get more love, after Blazers made playoffs and he drew an unfathomable number of offensive fouls, but overall a defensible vote.

items.title: Hawks Guard Dyson Daniels Named to Kia NBA All-Defensive Second Team
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt: Hawks Guard Dyson Daniels Named to Kia NBA All-Defensive Second Team NBA

items.title: Hawks guard Dyson Daniels has been named to the All-Defensive second team.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks guard Dyson Daniels has been named to the All-Defensive second team.

Daniels tied for the league lead in steals per game (2.0) and helped to drive Atlanta to a top-10 overall defense for the first time since the 2016-17 season.
